race.description: Frankston Sand Soil & Mini Mix Mdn Plate
race.comment: COSMIC SHOWER (6) showed good early speed then led into the straight when fresh from a spell last start before fighting on to finish third here over 1200m. Back in trip can suit and she'll be sharper, hard to catch if Neindorf can scoot across early. ALPINE POINT (11) finished out of the money on debut two starts back then close up in a bunched finish at Sale. Can improve again for top yard although the draw isn't ideal. LIQUID ASSET (12) is a first-starter by Tassort out of Happy Highway. Trialled well enough for the strong yard and is worth watching the market. SEALAND (10) resumes having shown ability last time in, respecting off some nice jumpouts.
